root_causes: deepseek-coder:6.7b leaks special tokens (<begin_of_sentence>) into code output (2/5 tests)
Generated code lacks null checks on regex matches (1/5 tests)
IP regex extraction buggy — split into octets instead of full address (1/5 tests)
risk_score sometimes None instead of integer
RTX 3050 4GB VRAM insufficient for qwen2.5:14b — could not test production model
conclusion: Path B (LLM generation) is NOT production-ready with current hardware and models. The 6.7B model has a 40% code execution rate and 19% effective IOC rate vs Path A's 100% execution and 79% IOC rate. Need either: (1) 8GB+ VRAM GPU for qwen2.5:14b, (2) DPO fine-tuning to improve code quality, or (3) post-processing to strip special tokens and add error handling.
